task.summary: Adding generate id from Factory, editing cFile and Factory File. Adding samples from file
cFile & cFileFactory -Adding convert cFileData to std::string -Automated free read data -Read (all, size, line, char) -Function on positional from file
Update system & fix bug - Adding updates in thread - Adding samples file from state manager - Fix file write from clean - Fix terminate threads - Fix free resource in threads
Scene, Object & Game Object - Adding base from Scene - Adding base from Object - Adding base from Game Object - Minimal refactoring

Scene, Object, Game Object & Scene factory - Setup cScene, cGameObject and cScene - Adding base cSceneFactory - Rename cThreadFacory::AddWork to AddObject - Add cThreadFacory::AddObject from 1 parametrs (auto start) - Bug fix: destroy threads
